name: both flows build from one decision: the application scaffold and the test-first IaC build unit
command:
printf '%s' '{"complete":true,"answers":{"motivation":"revenue","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"minutes","budget_posture":"balanced","data_volume":"large","read_write_pattern":"balanced","data_cadence":"real-time","criticality":"mission-critical","data_sensitivity":"confidential","compliance_regime":"none","scale":"large","consistency_need":"strong","communication_style":"event-driven","integration_scope":"public","workload":"a full-stack SaaS application"}}' > p.json
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect-session.sh --vision "a full-stack SaaS application" --profile p.json --out-dir s --now 2026-06-08T00:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/codesign-build.sh --requirements s/technical-requirements.json --platform aws --decision-id d1 --json 2>/dev/null > plan.json
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/scaffold.sh --kind node-api --target app 2>/dev/null
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cloud-build.sh scaffold --decision-id d1 --pillar security --requirements "encryption_at_rest,multi_az" --build-dir bd 2>/dev/null
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cloud-build.sh check --build-dir bd --unit d1 2>/dev/null; cbrc=$?
node -e 'process.exit(require("./plan.json").reconciled===true?0:1)' && [ -f app/package.json ] && [ -d bd/d1 ] && [ "$cbrc" -eq 1 ] && echo both-flows-from-one-decision 1>&2
